name: Urad Dal Ki Roti
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the urad dal for a few minutes, or soak overnight and drain it.
2. Grind the cooked dal coarsely.
3. Fry the ground dal and dry spices (ginger, coriander, salt, chilli powder) in 2 tablespoons ghee for a few minutes.
4. Cook the mixture, covered, over low heat until the dal is fully cooked. Turn off the heat.
5. Remove from heat, cool slightly, and mix in flour, chopped onions, coriander leaves, crushed pomegranate seeds.
6. Add enough water to form a stiff dough.
7. Roll each ball of dough into thin circles using balls the size of lemons.
8. Fry each roti in oil until golden brown.
9. Serve hot.
